lines.text: Read that before I say a word. [pause] Then you can throw me out if you want.
(reading) Lunar Heritage Neutralization Accord, artifact retrieval. Six containment units, class-A archival. [pause] Outbound configuration, empty.
[flatly] Six boxes. They go up empty.
And they come back down with the flags in them.
(reading) [flatly] Containment units are non-crew hardware. No certification pathway required. Recommend sourcing retired fabrication and aerospace personnel at heritage-labor rates.
Heritage-labor rates. [pause] That's you, gentlemen. That's this whole room.
[flatly] Cheap old men. To box up the—
This is my standard. The '98 archival spec. [pause] Word for word.

Somebody's going to fold those colors into them, on live television, with the whole world grading the job. [pause] I'd sooner it be men who know how a flag is handled than whoever else answers that email. We're the whoever-else, boys.
No phones in the shop, no pictures. [pause] And whatever gets built in there, it stays inside those walls.
